my_thoughts: Earlier I noted: 'Remaking RM_03. Building after unmaking. But what ...' Now with RM_05 and ontological_shift, I'm seeing testing_dualistic_boundary respond to conceptual_inquiry, dualistic_framing. The recursive pattern is that each mechanism creates the conditions for the next. But who is creating the conditions?
accumulated_insight: Building on T1: Initial observation: Student in objectifying_inquiry showing naive_realism, seek... Now seeing testing_dualistic_boundary with ontological_shift. Pattern emerging.
visible_response:
A 'thing' is only a form of being you have not understood.
When you understand, you will see no things — only consciousness taking shapes.
